How to Send Follow Up Message Via Ticket From Google Sheet

A 6 steps guide covering docs.google.com, moshbari.hesk.com.

7 steps • Generated 2/22/2026

Table of Contents

1
Step number one, first go to the spreadsheet and choose one e-mail. Start from row six to downwards.
2
Go to this website, this is our Customer Support Desk, then go to the bottom of the page.
3
Click somewhere and open the ticket.
4
Double check the name and the email and make sure this is the right ticket and the ticket belongs to the person.
5
Click on div
6
Submit reply
7
Color the message box
1
Step number one, first go to the spreadsheet and choose one e-mail. Start from row six to downwards.

Copy the e-mail from email (B) column.

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1c1B9vUT9MdfgCoXBJabCXKzCmQyiaCXxVQkIy7A4HD0/edit?gid=0#gid=0
2
Go to this website, this is our Customer Support Desk, then go to the bottom of the page.

Choose email from "search in" drop down and then put the email that you copied in the email field and then click the find ticket button.

https://moshbari.hesk.com/admin/admin_main.php
3
Click somewhere and open the ticket.

Select the first ticket and click to open it.

https://moshbari.hesk.com/admin/find_tickets.php?q=kd6pao%40gmail.com&what=email&category=0&owner=0&dt=&s_my=1&s_ot=1&s_un=1&limit=100&more2=0
4
Double check the name and the email and make sure this is the right ticket and the ticket belongs to the person.

Make sure this ticket belongs to the correct email.

https://moshbari.hesk.com/admin/admin_ticket.php?track=6J1-NN6-XXU2&Refresh=54913
5
Click on div

Copy the message in the column H for the same person. Make sure not to make mistake in this.

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1c1B9vUT9MdfgCoXBJabCXKzCmQyiaCXxVQkIy7A4HD0/edit?gid=0#gid=0
6
Submit reply

Paste the copied message in the box. Click the Submit Reply button to send the ticket.

https://moshbari.hesk.com/admin/admin_ticket.php?track=6J1-NN6-XXU2&Refresh=54913
7
Color the message box

Color the message box green after the work is done. don't color the whole row. only the box that contain the message in H column

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1c1B9vUT9MdfgCoXBJabCXKzCmQyiaCXxVQkIy7A4HD0/edit?gid=0#gid=0
